commit_scope: Ship the trusted phone presence receipt across Android, iPhone, macOS, Windows, and web, with phone calls as the first action lane.

local_validation.notes: Form validation passed with phone-presence-band -> 4095 across the sibling kernels and fkwu registration present in fourth-arm-bands.txt. The first web build attempt failed because next was not installed in web/node_modules; npm ci restored the package-lock dependency set, then npm run build passed. npm ci reported existing peer warnings and 4 audit findings; no tracked package files changed.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: Pending merge and public deploy verification.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: /sense now recognizes iPhone explicitly and shows a first-class iPhone presence entry that routes to the live surface while the Form receipt proves Android, iPhone, macOS, Windows, and web call floors.
test_flows: Open /sense from an iPhone user agent and confirm the iPhone card is marked as the current device.
Open /sense from Android and macOS user agents and confirm existing cards still render.
After deploy, run the public web/API verification flow required by the release thread.

phase_gate.reason: The cross-platform receipt, iPhone web/call door, documentation, and local proof are complete. Native iOS packaging, CallKit runtime receipts, PR checks, merge, and public deploy verification remain future phase gates.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/phone-presence.fk defines the platform support, Form-native floor, phone flag, call mode, surface mode, memory readiness, and receipt accessors.

form/form-stdlib/tests/phone-presence-band.fk proves Android, iPhone, macOS, Windows, web, Android direct/dialer lanes, iPhone tel/CallKit lanes, web tel links, and shared memory readiness with verdict 4095; fkwu is registered in form/fourth-arm-bands.txt.
web/app/sense/page.tsx detects iPhone/iPad/iPod user agents and renders an iPhone presence card that routes to /sense/surface.
specs/trusted-phone-presence.md records the official Apple CallKit, Apple tel link/default-calling-app, Android intent, Android permission-minimization, and Android default-dialer source links.
docs/coherence-substrate/phone-presence.form keeps the phone framed as trusted presence, not surveillance, and names native iOS packaging as the next carrier proof.
